title: Ts@phow #6825
definition:
Zepho or Zephi = "watch-tower"

 1) son of Eliphaz and grandson of Esau and one of the chiefs of the
    Edomites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zepho or Zephi = "watch-tower"

 1) son of Eliphaz and grandson of Esau and one of the chiefs of the
    Edomites

    NASB:  perh. gazing, an Edomite
